file_summary: This is the main process file for an Electron application built with Vite. It sets up environment paths, creates a BrowserWindow, handles window lifecycle events, and manages development vs production loading. The application uses Electron's main process to create a window that can load either from a Vite dev server or from built static files.

line_windows.summary: This window covers the entire main process file. It starts with imports from Electron and Node.js modules (lines 1-4), sets up path utilities and environment variables for the project structure (lines 6-20), declares the main window variable (line 22), defines the createWindow function that initializes the BrowserWindow with configuration and loading logic (lines 24-41), sets up application lifecycle event handlers for window closing and activation (lines 47-60), and finally starts the application by calling createWindow when Electron is ready (line 62). The window shows the complete initialization and lifecycle management of an Electron application.
